text: I feel intrigued by the interplay of light and shadow, the purples glowing in the darkness. The environment feels experimental and liminal—caught between technology and mystery. The second room, with its wall marked R+D, speaks to innovation. A description on the screen invites philosophical questions about the overlap between nature and constructed spaces, prompting me to reflect on the boundaries between the known and the imagined. I feel thoughtful, alert, and slightly out of place, but curious to discover what knowledge or insight might emerge in this space.
